query:
INSERT INTO to_device_messages (
                sender_user_id,
                sender_device_id,
                recipient_user_id,
                recipient_device_id,
                event_type,
                content,
                message_id,
                stream_id,
                created_ts
            )
            VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, nextval('to_device_stream_id_seq'), $8)
